ddls:
CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio manager */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the portfolio was created */,
  "initial_investment" REAL /* Initial investment amount for the portfolio */,
  "investment_strategy" TEXT /* Strategy used for investment decisions (e.g., growth, value, dividend) */,
  "risk_tolerance" TEXT /* Level of risk tolerance for the portfolio (e.g., conservative, moderate, aggressive) */,
  "target_return" REAL /* Target return on investment for the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES portfolio_managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the portfolio the asset belongs to */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the asset */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of the asset (e.g., stock, bond) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the asset (e.g., technology, healthcare) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the asset (e.g., finance, energy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset related to the trade */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "qty_chg" INTEGER /* Change in quantity of the asset */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price at the time of trade */,
  "cum_qty" INTEGER /* Cumulative quantity after trade */,
  "mv" REAL /* Market value of the trade */,
  "cost_chg" REAL /* Change in cost of the asset */,
  "cost" REAL /* Total cost of the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the manager (e.g., lead, associate) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team of the manager (e.g., equity, fixed income) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the portfolio for which the metrics apply */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the metric evaluation */,
  "return" REAL /* Return on investment for the portfolio */,
  "risk" REAL /* Risk assessment score for the portfolio */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the portfolio */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change entry in trade history */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade being updated */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "qty_chg" INTEGER /* Change in quantity of the asset */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price after the change */,
  "mv" REAL /* New market value after the change */,
  "cost_chg" REAL /* New cost change after the change */,
  "previous_adj_close" REAL /* Previous adjusted closing price before the change */,
  "previous_mv" REAL /* Previous market value before the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, manager) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team of the user (e.g., equity, fixed income) */,
  "portfolio_access" TEXT /* Portfolios accessible to the user (comma-separated list) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "layout" TEXT /* Layout of the dashboard (e.g., grid, chart) */,
  "portfolio_ids" TEXT /* Portfolios included in the dashboard (comma-separated list) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade being updated */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value of the field being changed */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the field being changed */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
